company: WK Kellogg Co (formerly Kellogg Company - cereal business post-2023 split)

mentions.note: Proven breakup case study: Oct 2023 split into Kellanov (snacks: Pringles, Cheez-Its, Pop-Tarts, Eggo) and WK Kellogg (cereal). Mars paid $83.50/share ($36B) for Kellanov; Ferrero paid $23/share ($3.1B) for WK. 72% and 59% returns in 2 years despite 'junk food' vulnerability to GLP-1.
